Package lu.kbra.pclib.listener

Class AbstractEventManager

java.lang.Object
lu.kbra.pclib.listener.AbstractEventManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, EventManager
Direct Known Subclasses:
AsyncEventManager, SyncEventManager
public abstract class AbstractEventManager extends Object implements AutoCloseable, EventManager
